soft_skills: ability to explain technical material clearly
support others in teaching or mentoring capacity

item.title: Co-Founder & AI Developer
details: Designed and delivered a full-stack web platform using Django + REST (end-to-end feature development).

Built a customer-support RAG system in Python on a 27K dataset, covering CSV/JSON ingestion, dual retrieval (dense embeddings + scikit-learn TF-IDF), and NumPy similarity ranking with deterministic top-k selection.
Implemented evidence-grounded answer generation with Ollama and supported analytics/reporting in Power BI.
Hardened LLM extraction via OpenAI API using structured outputs + validation + regression tests for stability.

item.title: Full-Stack Developer Engineer
details: Supported and enhanced a production web system using Django and REST Framework, contributing to application workflows and system reliability within a cloud-based environment.
Assisted in maintaining an automated data collection process (Selenium, Requests), supporting scheduled execution, retries, deduplication, and structured CSV outputs for operational reporting.

item.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Developed a full-stack submission feature by integrating a Next.js (React + TypeScript) client with a FastAPI API.
Built core submission endpoints with Pydantic validation, iteratively debugging and refining OPENAI API prompt that reduced response waiting time by 20%.

item.title: Peer-Assisted Learning (PAL) Leader – C Programming
details: Provided technical support through collaborative debugging sessions, investigating issues and explaining root causes to users with varying technical backgrounds.
Helped a student raise quiz from 20% to 90% and assignment grade from 40% to 99.5% within 6 weeks.

item.title: Executive Leader
details: Reduced manual setup time by 75% by building a Python automation script on Raspberry Pi to configure and automate keypad input.
Attracted 300 people through 6 workshops delivering sessions on Flask, Python, and Selenium.

item.title: AI-Powered AuditRAG — Traceable Answering System | GITHUB
details: Built a source-grounded RAG system with normalized chunking, JSONL indexing, stable chunk anchors, and dense embedding retrieval cutting unsupported answers by 20%.
Implemented an AI research assistant to automate ingestion and retrieval over financial filings and market news, enabling semantic top-k search across embedded chunks.

item.title: AI-Powered AuditRAG — Traceable Answering System | GITHUB
details: Built a source-grounded RAG with chunking, embedding and retrieval cutting unsupported answers by 20%.
Implemented AI research assistant to automate ingestion and retrieval over financial filings and market news, enabling semantic top-k search across embedded chunks.

item.title: TCP/IP Messaging Service & WPF Client — C#, .NET Framework 4.7.2
details: Developed and supported a Windows-based service enabling TCP/IP communication between system components, using structured configuration and logging to assist monitoring and troubleshooting.
Built a client application to periodically poll system messages, improving operational visibility and reducing manual monitoring effort.

item.title: Stock Daily Report Automation (UIPath)
details: Developed a UIPath automation to retrieve and process daily market data for a small configurable list of stock tickers and generate a standardized Excel report.
Automated report distribution via Outlook email, reducing manual reporting steps by 30% and improving consistency of daily delivery.

item.title: Automated Linux Security Self-Check
details: Developed a Python automation to perform recurring Linux security self-checks (SSH configuration, authentication detection and exposure monitoring) and generate standardized, timestamped audit reports.
Automated scheduled execution and report generation, reducing manual verification effort by 50%
Added error handling (retry logic, safe fallbacks, and clear PASS/WARN/FAIL summaries) to handle variations
